description: Style Note Inspired by the Spin bowling during the 1996 World Cup, spinz came into being. You can embody a wining spirit with this range of long lasting perfumed deodorants with their sporty fragrances. Product Details Spinz's Enchante deo comes in an aerosol spray canister and has a lavender based floral fragrance Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
